summary: Completed testing of PHASE 3.5 CLAIM FLOW and PHASE 4 ECONOMY SYNC implementation. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend components exist but not integrated into UI.

ui_bugs.issue: MyPositions component exists but not rendered in Arena UI
ui_bugs.description: Component is built and exported but not imported/used in ArenaFeed.tsx
ClaimSheet depends on MyPositions to trigger, but MyPositions is not in UI

integration_issues.issue: Complete claim flow not accessible in UI
integration_issues.description: Users cannot see positions or claim winnings despite backend support

passed_tests: Economy stats API with XP/level data
XP service webhook endpoints (bet_placed, position_won, position_lost, position_claimed)

success_percentage.frontend: 60% - Core UI works but claim flow components not integrated

items: Integrate MyPositions component into ArenaFeed.tsx or create dedicated positions section
Ensure ClaimSheet is accessible when users have winning positions
Add navigation/access to positions from main Arena UI
Test complete claim flow end-to-end once UI integration is complete
action_item_for_main_agent.details: PHASE 4 ECONOMY SYNC backend is fully functional. PHASE 3.5 CLAIM FLOW backend works but frontend components need UI integration. All XP service methods (onBetPlaced, onWin, onLoss, onClaim) are working through webhook endpoints.
